channel.title: NTLSN — Australian HE Teaching & Learning Events
channel.description: Upcoming symposiums, workshops and PD across all 42 Australian universities.

item.title: UniSQ PL-Connect 2026 Professional Learning Series (2026-07-20 – 2026-11-27)
item.description: UniSQ · UniSQ School of Education's expanded online PD series — 33 short practical sessions across 11 topics (AI integration, literacy, First Nations education, educator wellbeing and more); live and recorded. Individual session dates TBC — series runs across late 2026.

item.title: UNE L&T Symposium: Student Voice & Engagement (2026-07-21)
item.description: UNE · UNE full-day L&T Symposium — student voice & student engagement. Keynote: Prof Jason Lodge (UQ). Online via Zoom, 10am AEST. Convened by Dr Kashmira Davé.

item.title: CAULLT: Distributed Leadership for Academic Integrity (2026-07-24)
item.description: Perspectives from diverse leaders on distributed leadership that supports academic integrity in higher education.

item.title: ASCILITE x Turnitin: Assurance of Learning (2026-08-07)
item.description: QUT · Assurance of learning and generative AI.

item.title: Bond Innovation in Education Forum (2026-08-20)
item.description: Bond · Personalised learning, small-group pedagogy.

item.title: AU & AAUT Breakfast: Dr Miao Li (CSU) (2026-08-20)
item.description: Adelaide · Citation recipient. Details to be announced.

item.title: CQU Tertiary Teaching Online Conference (2026-08-25 – 2026-08-27)
item.description: CQU · Three-day online conference — "Teaching practice becomes scholarship by learning through design." Five themes (Collaboration & Belonging, AI-Enhanced L&T, Contemporary Assessment, Professional Identity, Students as Partners); live-streamed + recorded. Hosted by Academic Board & Learning & Teaching Futures.

item.title: CDU Northern Teaching Symposium (2026-08-26)
item.description: CDU · First Nations pedagogies, remote learning.

item.title: AAUT & HERDSA Webinar Session 4 (2026-08-27)
item.description: Details to be announced.

item.title: National Education Summit - Melbourne (2026-09-03 – 2026-09-04)
item.description: UniMelb · Melbourne Convention and Exhibition Centre.

item.title: ASCILITE Spring into Excellence (2026-09-07 – 2026-09-09)
item.description: RMIT · 3-day intensive at RMIT Melbourne.

item.title: Newcastle Education Innovation Symposium (2026-09-09)
item.description: Newcastle · Regional engagement, WIL, STEM reform.

item.title: Swinburne Innovation in Teaching Day (2026-09-09)
item.description: Swinburne · Technology-enhanced teaching.

item.title: Sydney Teaching Symposium (2026-09-16 – 2026-09-17)
item.description: USyd · USyd's annual symposium — practical, transferable, student-centred teaching (Educational Innovation). Date TBC.

item.title: VU Block Model Symposium (2026-09-16)
item.description: VU · VU Block Model Academy.

item.title: ACU Teaching & Service Symposium (2026-09-17)
item.description: ACU · Teaching excellence with community service.

item.title: AU & AAUT Breakfast: Spencer & Jones (RMIT) (2026-09-17)
item.description: Adelaide · Teaching Excellence Award recipients. Details to be announced.

item.title: RMIT Learning & Teaching Festival (2026-09-23)
item.description: RMIT · Multi-day cross-campus festival (Melbourne + Vietnam) — innovative teaching and GenAI responses. Date TBC.

item.title: AAUT & HERDSA Webinar Session 5 (2026-09-24)
item.description: Details to be announced.

item.title: Macquarie Learning Innovation Week (2026-09-28 – 2026-10-02)
item.description: Macquarie · Five days of workshops and showcases.

item.title: UC Teaching Innovation Forum (2026-09-30)
item.description: UC · Connected learning, micro-credentials.

item.title: Global Students as Partners Roundtable 2026 (2026-10-01 – 2026-10-02)
item.description: USyd · "Living the Claims: Embedding Equity for Authentic Partnership in a Changing World." Co-hosted by USyd Business School & Faculty of Science. Day 1 (1 Oct) development workshop; Day 2 (2 Oct) hybrid conference. CFP closes 29 Jun 2026.

item.title: Curtin Teaching Excellence Week (2026-10-05 – 2026-10-09)
item.description: Curtin · Workshops, masterclasses, and awards.

item.title: Monash Education Academy Showcase (2026-10-07 – 2026-10-08)
item.description: Monash · MEA fellowship projects and teaching innovations.

item.title: La Trobe Teaching Excellence Day (2026-10-08)
item.description: La Trobe · Teaching innovation and student success.

item.title: JCU Tropical Teaching Week (2026-10-12 – 2026-10-16)
item.description: JCU · Place-based education, marine science pedagogy.

item.title: Deakin Teaching & Learning Conference (2026-10-14 – 2026-10-15)
item.description: Deakin · DTeach conference on inclusive teaching.

item.title: Adelaide University T&L Showcase (2026-10-14 – 2026-10-15)
item.description: Adelaide · First full-year showcase post-merger.

item.title: ANU Teaching Celebration (2026-10-15)
item.description: ANU · Outstanding teaching contributions.

item.title: Notre Dame Teaching Colloquium (2026-10-15)
item.description: Notre Dame · Values-based education, ethics, mentoring.

item.title: AU & AAUT Breakfast: Dr Amanda Gigliotti (UOW) (2026-10-15)
item.description: Adelaide · Citation recipient. Details to be announced.

item.title: Griffith L&T Week (2026-10-19 – 2026-10-23)
item.description: Griffith · Workshops, awards, and community events.

item.title: UniMelb Teaching & Learning Showcase (2026-10-21 – 2026-10-22)
item.description: UniMelb · Annual showcase of teaching practice.

item.title: UOW Teaching & Learning Forum (2026-10-22)
item.description: UOW · Authentic assessment, digital literacy.

item.title: AIEC 2026 (2026-10-27 – 2026-10-30)
item.description: USyd · 40th anniversary in Sydney. Theme: 'Future Thinking'.

item.title: QUT L&T Symposium (2026-10-28)
item.description: QUT · Learning design, digital pedagogy, first-year experience.

item.title: ISSoTL 2026 Conference (2026-10-28 – 2026-10-31)
item.description: USyd · University of Saskatchewan, Canada.

item.title: WSU Teaching Showcase (2026-10-29)
item.description: WSU · Community-engaged teaching.

item.title: UQ Teaching & Learning Week (2026-11-02 – 2026-11-06)
item.description: UQ · ITaLI's flagship week celebrating teaching excellence.

item.title: UTS Learning & Teaching Forum (2026-11-04 – 2026-11-05)
item.description: UTS · UTS's whole-of-university forum — blended learning, authentic assessment; closes with the VC's L&T Awards. 2026 date TBC; listed on Education Express when open.

item.title: CSU Regional Education Showcase (2026-11-04)
item.description: CSU · Regional, rural, remote education.

item.title: SCU Teaching Innovation Day (2026-11-04)
item.description: SCU · Regenerative education, sustainability.

item.title: UTAS Teaching Matters (2026-11-11)
item.description: UTAS · Annual conference on teaching and learning.

item.title: UNE Teaching Excellence Showcase (2026-11-11)
item.description: UNE · Online and distance education innovation.

item.title: UNSW Education Festival (2026-11-16 – 2026-11-25)
item.description: UNSW · Annual festival. Cross-faculty showcases.

item.title: POD 51st Annual Conference (2026-11-17 – 2026-11-20)
item.description: USyd · Baltimore, USA.

item.title: Flinders Teaching Awards & Showcase (2026-11-18)
item.description: Flinders · Teaching awards and poster showcase.

item.title: FedUni Teaching & Learning Showcase (2026-11-18)
item.description: FedUni · Teaching across campuses.

item.title: Murdoch Teaching Excellence Showcase (2026-11-18)
item.description: Murdoch · Health, engineering, humanities.

item.title: ECUlture 2026 (2026-11-23)
item.description: ECU · ECU's annual L&T conference (Centre for Learning & Teaching) — "Celebrating innovative and inclusive teaching". Joondalup + online.

item.title: USC Teaching Forum (2026-11-25)
item.description: USC · Growth, teaching quality, student experience.

item.title: ASCILITE 2026 (2026-11-29 – 2026-12-02)
item.description: QUT · Rydges Southbank, Brisbane.

item.title: AAEE 2026 — Make the Impossible, Possible (2026-12-13 – 2026-12-16)
item.description: UNSW · 37th Australasian Association for Engineering Education conference at UNSW — scholarly engineering education, innovative teaching practices and workshops.
